queries.question: Provide a list of all psychologists and also provide a list of all psychiatrists working in the clinic called Harmony Wellness Center.
queries.sql:
SELECT Psychologists.name
FROM Clinics JOIN Psychologists ON Clinics.id = Psychologists.clinic_id
UNION
SELECT Psychiatrists.name
FROM Clinics JOIN Psychiatrists ON Clinics.id = Psychiatrists.clinic_id
WHERE Clinics.name = "Harmony Wellness Center"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?clinics a :Clinics .
    ?psychologists a :Psychologists .
    ?psychologists p:hasClinics ?clinics .
    ?psychologists p:name ?name .
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?clinics a :Clinics .
    ?psychiatrists a :Psychiatrists .
    ?psychiatrists p:hasClinics ?clinics .
    ?psychiatrists p:name ?name .
    ?clinics p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Harmony Wellness Center")
    BIND(?name AS ?o0)
  }
}

queries.question: What psychologists work in Harmony Wellness Center and what psychiatrists work in the clinic with the same name?
queries.sql:
SELECT Psychologists.name
FROM Clinics JOIN Psychologists ON Clinics.id = Psychologists.clinic_id
WHERE Clinics.name = "Harmony Wellness Center"
UNION
SELECT Psychiatrists.name
FROM Clinics JOIN Psychiatrists ON Clinics.id = Psychiatrists.clinic_id
WHERE Clinics.name = "Harmony Wellness Center"

    ?psychiatrists a :Psychiatrists .

    ?psychiatrists p:name ?name .
    ?clinics p:name ?name_f .

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show psychologists and psychiatrists of Harmony Wellness Center.
